NEWS, MEDIA AND OPINION

The latest news and views about my work for the residents of Aldershot and Farnborough.
News

ALEX BAKER MP’S SPEECH TO PARLIAMENT DURING THE NORTHERN IRELAND TROUBLES BILL CARRY OVER MOTION

For months I have been meeting with veterans, pressing Government Ministers, and written directly to the Secretary of State. My message has been clear: we need stronger protections for our veterans in the Northern Ireland Troubles Bill.

Read More »
Alex Baker MP 28/04/2026
News

A £20 million boost for Cherrywood

Working together, Alex Baker MP and Rushmoor Borough Council have secured £20 million to invest in the Cherrywood community through Labour’s ‘Pride in Place’ programme.

Read More »
Alex Baker MP 22/03/2026
News

100 Days to Go: Armed Forces Day is coming home to Aldershot

Hundreds of schoolchildren joined service personnel to start the 100 day countdown to the national Armed Forces Day
celebrations in Aldershot yesterday

Read More »
Alex Baker MP 20/03/2026
News

New Farnborough Leisure Centre plans get the green light

An exciting new leisure centre in Farnborough was given the go-ahead on Wednesday night in what campaigners have hailed as a ‘major victory for local families’.

Read More »
Alex Baker MP 13/03/2026
News

Supporting our Armed Forces and their families in times of crisis

There is a sizeable number of civilians and service families with local connections in the Middle East or with loved ones there. They are facing an incredibly challenging and dangerous time and I have been working very hard with my Parliamentary colleagues to make sure everyone is safe.

Read More »
Alex Baker MP 11/03/2026
News

Sink holes, potholes and gaps in accountability

Residents are rightly asking when lasting repairs to our roads will be delivered. I have met the Conservative-run County Council to press for clear timelines, transparent communication and a firm plan for permanent repairs, particularly in areas residents have repeatedly flagged with me.

Read More »
Alex Baker MP 26/02/2026
Load More

FOLLOW ON SOCIAL MEDIA

Alex Baker MP
Play

The Renter's Rights Bill comes in to force today, making housing fairer for over 20,000 renters across Rushmoor.

But laws are only effective when they're enforced locally. That's why, working with our Labour councillors, we are:
✅ Ending no-fault evictions for good.
✅ Holding landlords accountable for housing quality.
✅ Taking direct enforcement action where standards aren’t met.

Made possible by a Labour council, working with a Labour MP and Government, to deliver real fairer housing standards for renters.

#farnborough #aldershot #Rushmoorsontrack #rushmoorlabour ... See MoreSee Less

2 days ago
View on Facebook

GET IN TOUCH

I would love to hear from you about what you think my priorities should be as your MP and what matters most to you.

I can also help you with issues such as benefits, housing, immigration, tax, the NHS and education. I aim to respond promptly to everyone, but please remember that I have to prioritise constituents with the most urgent or pressing issues. Campaign or policy issues may take a bit longer. There is also a list of other agencies that may help you here.

Please use the contact form to get in touch with me. Please remember to provide as many details as possible, including your name, address and full details of your issue. Don’t forget your postcode!

  • 020 7219 4085
  • alex.baker.mp@parliament.uk
Contact (Footer)

Social Media

Facebook X-twitter Instagram

Get Involved

Please use the contact form here to get in touch with me and find out more about my campaigns, priorities and how to get involved. Please remember to provide as much details as possible, including your full contact details.
